title: SimpleInvSee
description: Real-time administrative auditing. Silently access, monitor, and flawlessly edit live player inventories & Ender Chests.
body:
# 🎒 InvSee Elite — Administrative Inventory Intercept **The definitive administration utility for keeping players strictly honest.** [![Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/Version-1.0.0-blue.svg?style=for-the-badge&logoColor=white)](#) [![Supported Versions](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-1.21+-green.svg?style=for-the-badge&logoColor=white)](#) [![Java](https://img.shields.io/badge/Java-21+-orange.svg?style=for-the-badge&logoColor=white)](#) [![Dependencies](https://img.shields.io/badge/Dependencies-None-red.svg?style=for-the-badge&logoColor=white)](#)
--- ## 🌟 Overview & Philosophy No established, professional administration team is comprehensively complete without the explicit ability to verify, audit, and investigate active player item activities natively in-game. Did a suspiciously new player just drop 64 diamond blocks? Is a hacker carrying illegitimate, glitched bedrock blocks? **InvSee** is a ruthlessly efficient, zero-configuration moderation utility. It flawlessly grants your staff team the unmitigated authority to visually peer into absolutely anyone's physical inventory, backpack, armor slots, and strictly private ender chests remotely, completely silently, and natively in real-time. It provides the premium moderation features you expect from a massive suite, stripped down entirely to its bare essential Java framework to absolutely lock in flawless server performance. ## ✨ What Sets InvSee Apart? - 🔍 **Real-Time Live Active Mirror Viewing:** When you natively execute the command to open a target player's inventory, you see exactly what they see natively. If they mine a block of dirt or pick up an item, that item instantly and viscerally pops up in your viewing GUI. You observe their exact item movements in real-time! - ✋ **Interactive Read/Write Capabilities:** Your staff isn't just a passive observer—they have complete Write-Access privileges natively integrated! Have you caught a hacker roaming with illegal max-level armor? You can literally click the armor directly from their active GUI view and physically drag it right out of their inventory into your own hotbar seamlessly, effectively confiscating the item without banning them. - 🔮 **Private EnderChest Profiling Integrations:** Hackers understand that simple game admins check standard inventories, so they exclusively hide their incredibly high-value duped loot completely in their private EnderChest blocks. InvSee comes natively equipped with highly specialized `/endersee` logic variables to forcefully break right into their vault array, regardless of where the target player is standing. ## 🛠️ Comprehensive Feature List ### 1. Absolute Silent Execution Strategy A critical flaw with older moderation plugins is notifying the target. When an Admin runs our command, the target player receives exactly zero notifications, sounds, or visual cues that their inventory data array is actively being breached, monitored, or investigated manually. ### 2. Spigot Tab-Complete Auto-Optimization Manually typing out complex player names perfectly shouldn't take long. Start typing `/invsee Dzak...` and merely hit your `Tab` key! The plugin inherently hooks into the Spigot TabComplete interface framework to auto-complete online player names instantly, saving your moderation team extreme amounts of time. ### 3. Complete Permissions Hierarchy Separation A smart server owner limits capabilities. You can grant your low-level probationary `Moderators` the express ability to visually view standard backpacks using basic permissions, but physically lock and reserve the specific ability to actively breach high-value persistent EnderChests strictly to your most trusted `Admin` personnel! --- ## 📝 Configuration & Operations Notes Because of InvSee's architectural design, it operates totally perfectly right outside the box. **It boasts zero configuration (`config.yml`) files!** You simply grant the permissions and your moderation team gets to work immediately. ## 📌 Commands & Permissions Architecture | Command | Permission Node | Functionality | |---------|-----------------|---------------| | `/invsee ` | `invsee.use` | Forces open a live, real-time mirror window of the target's entire physical backpack and active hotbar slots. | | `/endersee `| `invsee.enderchest` | Forces open a live, real-time mirror window of the target's strictly private persistent enderchest interface array. | *Note: In order to execute the command, the operator explicitly requires these nodes granted via LuckPerms, UltraPermissions, or any standard permission management framework.* ## ⚙️ Setup & Installation 1. Physically copy the `InvSee-1.0.0.jar` binary file into your operating server's `/plugins/` networking directory. 2. Initialize and reboot the core server (Requires Java 21+ and 1.21.x variants). 3. Utilizing your active permission manager, manually give your staff members the required nodes. 4. Start silently auditing rule-breakers literally immediately! No YAML file editing required! ---
Developed with ❤️ by dzakwan.ib | Designed for High-Peformance Servers
